parameters.query: ={{ "UPDATE tokens SET status = 'active', pf_payment_id = '" + $json.pf_payment_id.replace(/'/g, '') + "', expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '30 days', activated_at = NOW() WHERE code = '" + $json.token_code.replace(/'/g, '') + "' AND status = 'pending_payment' RETURNING id, code, email;" }}

parameters.subject: Your BeeGraded Token is Ready!
parameters.text:
={{ 'Hi there!

Your BeeGraded evaluation token has been activated.

Token Code: ' + $node['Parse ITN Data'].json.token_code + '

Get started here: https://beegraded.co.za/t/' + $node['Parse ITN Data'].json.token_code + '

Steps:
1. Upload your rubric PDF
2. Upload your draft paper
3. Get your full evaluation report
4. Upload your final version for comparison

Your token is valid for 30 days.

— BeeGraded Team' }}

parameters.functionCode:
// Log success and return OK
return [{ json: { status: 'ok', message: 'Token activated, email sent' } }];

// Payment not complete, log and ignore
return [{ json: { status: 'ignored', message: 'Payment status not COMPLETE' } }];
